sections.paragraph:
συμπαραμένω fut. συμπαραμενῶ (Thu. et al.; PSI 64, 3 [I b.c.]; Ps 71:5) stay with someone to help w. dat. of pers. (Thu. 6, 89, 4; SIG 567 A, 12f) πᾶσιν ὑμῖν Phil 1:25 v.l.

fut. fut. = fut.

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

dat. dat. = dative

pers. pers. = person(s)

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 958
